title: 14-Pack Small Plastic Serving Trays - 3-Compartment Dip Bowls & Condiment Tray for Parties, Sauce Sections (8.7" x 2.8" x 1")
features: 1. PERFECT FOR DIPS & SAUCES: Compact size (8.7" L x 2.8" W x 1" H) is IDEAL for holding dipping sauces (ketchup, mustard, ranch, BBQ), salsa, hummus, guacamole, dressings, small nuts, candies, olives, or relish. Not for large veggies or chips.

2. PORTION CONTROL & NEATNESS: 3 separate compartments keep sauces, dips, or small snacks organized and prevent mixing. Perfect for portion control, buffets, or keeping condiments tidy at BBQs, parties, or on crowded tables.

3. REUSABLE & EASY CLEAN: Made of sturdy, BPA-free plastic. Lightweight, crack-resistant, and dishwasher safe (top rack). Reuse them party after party – a budget-friendly alternative to disposable cups!
4. 14-PACK VALUE: Get 14 individual serving trays in one pack! Plenty for large gatherings, catering events, food trucks, or keeping a stash in your pantry. Great value compared to buying singles.
5. BEYOND FOOD: Versatile for crafts (paint palettes!), organizing small beads/screws, holding jewelry, or serving pet treats. Space-saving design fits easily on snack tables, desks, or counters.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎BPA Free, Chip Resistant, Dishwasher Safe, Reusable
